required_skills: Research prototype development and experimental systems engineering in Python or C++
Designing and implementing scalable research infrastructure for large-scale experimentation
Machine learning model development, training, and evaluation pipelines for research applications
Software engineering best practices including unit testing, CI/CD, and code review in a research context
Distributed computing and parallel processing for accelerating research experiments at scale
Research paper implementation and reproduction from academic literature across ML, systems, and applied science domains
Data pipeline engineering for ingestion, preprocessing, and feature engineering of large scientific datasets
Profiling and optimising computationally intensive research code for CPU and GPU execution environments
Collaboration with research scientists to translate theoretical ideas into working experimental implementations
Technical writing and documentation of research codebases, experimental methodologies, and engineering findings
preferred_skills: Experience with GPU programming using CUDA or OpenCL for accelerated scientific computing
Familiarity with MLOps tooling for experiment tracking, model versioning, and research infrastructure management
Knowledge of compiler design, numerical methods, or scientific computing optimisation techniques
Experience contributing to or maintaining open-source research libraries or scientific software packages
Familiarity with reinforcement learning systems implementation and simulation environment engineering
Experience with hardware-software co-design for custom research accelerators or FPGA-based prototypes
Knowledge of differential programming frameworks and automatic differentiation systems
responsibilities: Implement and iterate on novel machine learning architectures and research prototypes from academic papers, converting theoretical formulations into robust, reproducible experimental codebases
Design and build scalable research infrastructure including distributed training pipelines, experiment orchestration systems, and automated hyperparameter optimisation frameworks
Develop high-performance GPU kernels and optimised CUDA code to accelerate research model training and inference, profiling bottlenecks and tuning memory and compute utilisation
Partner with research scientists to rapidly prototype and evaluate new ideas, reducing the cycle time from hypothesis to validated experimental result through engineering efficiency
Establish and maintain research software engineering best practices including modular code architecture, comprehensive unit testing, CI/CD pipelines, and reproducible experiment management
Build and maintain large-scale data preprocessing and feature engineering pipelines capable of processing terabyte-scale scientific datasets using distributed computing frameworks
Evaluate and integrate emerging open-source research tools and frameworks into the team's research stack, assessing performance, scalability, and research velocity trade-offs
Reproduce and benchmark results from state-of-the-art research papers to establish reliable baselines for comparison against novel methods developed internally
Contribute research engineering insights to publications, technical reports, and conference presentations, co-authoring methods sections and supplementary materials
Mentor junior engineers on research software engineering practices, code quality standards, and strategies for navigating the research-to-engineering translation process
